01-item-beloved.title: Review a catalogued item
01-item-beloved.body: The embedded catalog-config CLI serves the library workspace from disk and renders the item with its authors, editions, copies, and holds.

02-collection-staff-picks.title: Review a collection
02-collection-staff-picks.body: The collection preview lists the items it groups and the shelves it occupies, resolved by id reference.

03-policy-standard-loan.title: Review a loan policy
03-policy-standard-loan.body: Loan policies are scoped to the catalog and point at a primary shelf by path reference.

04-catalog-source.title: Review the catalog container
04-catalog-source.body: The catalog source remains visible from the embedded workspace served by the catalog-config CLI.

05-branch-schwarzman.title: Review a branch
05-branch-schwarzman.body: Branch source files stay available alongside items, collections, and policies.
